title: Polish Crepes with Decadent Fillings
description: A traditional Polish breakfast dish, filled with decadent sweet treats. These crepes are made with love and care to create a delicious and filling breakfast.

ingredients.name: Eggs
ingredients.notes: Fresh eggs for the crepe batter

ingredients.name: Milk
ingredients.notes: Whole milk for the crepe batter

ingredients.name: Butter, melted
ingredients.notes: Melted butter for the crepe batter

ingredients.name: Sugar
ingredients.notes: Granulated sugar for the crepe batter

ingredients.name: Vanilla extract
ingredients.notes: Imitation vanilla extract for the crepe batter

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, eggs, milk, melted butter, sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
Heat a small non-stick pan over medium heat and brush with butter.
Once the pan is hot, pour in about 1/4 cup of the batter and tilt the pan to evenly coat the bottom.
Cook for about 1-2 minutes or until the edges start to curl and the surface is dry.
Loosen the crepe with a spatula and flip it over and cook for another minute.
Repeat with the remaining batter, until all the crepes are made.
To assemble, spread a tablespoon of chocolate spread on one half of the crepe, followed by a tablespoon of raspberry jam.
Fold the other half of the crepe over the filling and dust with powdered sugar.
Repeat with the remaining crepes and filling ingredients.
